title: Asset Log
description: Stores the historical actions for an asset. Internal Name: AssetLog.

ParentSeq.description: Sequence number of the parent Asset record.

Action.description: Type of action: AA=Acquisition, AD=Disposal, AP=Part Disposal, DS=Straight Line Depreciation, DD=Diminishing Value Depreciation, ME=Memo, RV=Revaluation.

Qty.description: Quantity involved in the action (e.g., for partial disposal).

Depreciation.description: Depreciation amount due to the action.

Rate.description: Depreciation rate (%) used for the action.

PrivateUsePercent.description: Private use percentage at the time of the action.

TransactionSeq.description: Sequence number of the GL transaction associated with action (if any).

Memo.description: User memo associated with the action.
